modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Zoom session is freezing and unresponsive.

full_description_text: User was in a Zoom session. Suddenly, the screen froze. They couldn't interact or see anything moving. It was really frustrating during the meeting.
short_description: Zoom session is freezing and unresponsive.
description: User was in a Zoom session. Suddenly, the screen froze. They couldn't interact or see anything moving. It was really frustrating during the meeting.
